title: elaeocarpus variabilis
intro: Elaeocarpus variabilis, also known as the Blue Olive or Blue Fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help alleviate pain, reduce fever, and prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus variabilis include its ability to boost the immune system, improve respiratory health, and lower blood pressure. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used to make a decoction or tincture for its medicinal properties.
